# Contributing to Flawless Studio

> This is a solo founder repository. External contributions are welcome but subject to strict review.

## Before Contributing

1. Read `CANON.md` — understand the Flawless system.
2. Read `GOVERNANCE.md` — understand the rules and roles.
3. Read `canon/flawless-method.md` — understand how decisions are made.

## How to Contribute

1. Open an issue describing the proposed change.
2. Wait for acknowledgment before starting work.
3. Submit a PR with:
   - Clear title and description
   - Reference to the issue
   - Updated bilingual files if canonical documents are touched
   - Entry in `docs/decisions/` if it's an architectural change

## Standards

- All canonical documents must exist in EN + ES.
- No direct push to `main`. All changes via PR.
- Apply the Flawless Filter before submitting.

---

_Questions? Contact [oneflawlessstudio@gmail.com](mailto:oneflawlessstudio@gmail.com)_
